subcodes.first_line: O thou who art intoxicated yet aware! Upon thee be the glory of God, His grace, His bounty and His beneficence throughout all ages! Intoxicated and enraptured art thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مست هوشیار علیک بهاء الله و فضله و جوده و احسانه فی مرور الادهار مست و مدهوش
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
